name: King George Family YMCA
description: King George Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in King George, VA. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: King George Tennis Center
description: King George Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in King George, VA. There are 6 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.
